inlineContent.text: The tutorial example contains a Package.swift file that defines the dependencies and targets for the app, as well as a Sources directory with starter files. The finished tutorial is also provided in the Completed folder.
The starter code contains all the files you’ll need to get started.
Follow the steps below for a quick introduction.
Carefully review the tutorial Starter files, noting the purpose of each. Then build and run the starter code to prove it’s operational.
Note:
Steps one through five will switch between each of the five files. Step six switches to a terminal.
The starter depends on the web framework Vapor, a package to manage the lifecycle of a service,
, a package to read configuration from different sources,
, and a package to add basic logs,
